preconditions: I can only register a screening case A if it is not the case that A is a registered case and it is not the case that A has been released
effects: Once I register a screening case A, it is the case that A is a registered case

assign_profile_to_case.description: assign a screening profile B to a screening case A
preconditions: I can only assign a screening profile B to a screening case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B is available and A is mapped to B
I can only assign a screening profile B to a screening case A if it is not the case that the profile is applied to A
effects: Once I assign a screening profile B to a screening case A, it is the case that A has the profile B and the profile is applied to A
Once I assign a screening profile B to a screening case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

retract_profile_from_case.description: retract a screening profile B from a screening case A
preconditions: I can only retract a screening profile B from a screening case A if it is the case that A has the profile B
I can only retract a screening profile B from a screening case A if it is not the case that A has been adjudicated and it is not the case that approval has been requested for A
effects: Once I retract a screening profile B from a screening case A, it is the case that B is available

Once I retract a screening profile B from a screening case A, it is not the case anymore that A has the profile B and it is not the case anymore that the profile is applied to A and it is not the case anymore that the investigation is assigned to A and it is not the case anymore that evidence is collected for A and it is not the case anymore that A has a high risk flag and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for final approval and it is not the case anymore that A requires senior review

attach_alert_evidence_to_case.description: attach an alert evidence B to a screening case A
preconditions: I can only attach an alert evidence B to a screening case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B is available as alert evidence
effects: Once I attach an alert evidence B to a screening case A, it is the case that A has a case evidence link to B
Once I attach an alert evidence B to a screening case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as alert evidence

detach_alert_evidence_from_case.description: detach an alert evidence B from a screening case A
preconditions: I can only detach an alert evidence B from a screening case A if it is the case that A has a case evidence link to B
effects: Once I detach an alert evidence B from a screening case A, it is the case that B is available as alert evidence
Once I detach an alert evidence B from a screening case A, it is not the case anymore that A has a case evidence link to B

assign_investigation_via_evidence.description: assign investigation to a screening case A using an alert evidence B
preconditions: I can only assign investigation to a screening case A using an alert evidence B if it is the case that A is a registered case and the profile is applied to A and A has a case evidence link to B
I can only assign investigation to a screening case A using an alert evidence B if it is not the case that the investigation is assigned to A
effects: Once I assign investigation to a screening case A using an alert evidence B, it is the case that the investigation is assigned to A

assign_investigator_for_automated_reason.description: assign investigator for automated reason a screening case A an automated hit reason B
preconditions: I can only assign investigator for automated reason a screening case A an automated hit reason B if it is the case that A is a registered case and the profile is applied to A and B is available as an automated hit reason
I can only assign investigator for automated reason a screening case A an automated hit reason B if it is not the case that the investigation is assigned to A
effects: Once I assign investigator for automated reason a screening case A an automated hit reason B, it is the case that the investigation is assigned to A and A has a high risk flag
Once I assign investigator for automated reason a screening case A an automated hit reason B, it is not the case anymore that B is available as an automated hit reason

investigator_collects_evidence.description: an investigator C collects an alert evidence B for a screening case A
preconditions: I can only an investigator C collects an alert evidence B for a screening case A if it is the case that the investigation is assigned to A and the profile is applied to A and A has a case evidence link to B and C is available as an investigator
I can only an investigator C collects an alert evidence B for a screening case A if it is not the case that evidence is collected for A
effects: Once I an investigator C collects an alert evidence B for a screening case A, it is the case that evidence is collected for A
Once I an investigator C collects an alert evidence B for a screening case A, it is not the case anymore that A has a high risk flag

approver_adds_evidence.description: an approver B adds evidence to a screening case A
preconditions: I can only an approver B adds evidence to a screening case A if it is the case that the profile is applied to A and B has an approval record for the case A
I can only an approver B adds evidence to a screening case A if it is not the case that evidence is collected for A
effects: Once I an approver B adds evidence to a screening case A, it is the case that evidence is collected for A
Once I an approver B adds evidence to a screening case A, it is not the case anymore that A has a high risk flag

link_party_match_to_case.description: link a party match B to a screening case A
preconditions: I can only link a party match B to a screening case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B resource is available and A is mapped to B
effects: Once I link a party match B to a screening case A, it is the case that A matches with the party B
Once I link a party match B to a screening case A, it is not the case anymore that B resource is available

unlink_party_match_from_case.description: unlink a party match B from a screening case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a party match B from a screening case A if it is the case that A matches with the party B
effects: Once I unlink a party match B from a screening case A, it is the case that B resource is available
Once I unlink a party match B from a screening case A, it is not the case anymore that A matches with the party B

link_watchlist_hit_to_case.description: link a watchlist hit type B to a screening case A
preconditions: I can only link a watchlist hit type B to a screening case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B is available on the watchlist and A is mapped to B
effects: Once I link a watchlist hit type B to a screening case A, it is the case that A has a watchlist hit of type B
Once I link a watchlist hit type B to a screening case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available on the watchlist

unlink_watchlist_hit_from_case.description: unlink a watchlist hit type B from a screening case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a watchlist hit type B from a screening case A if it is the case that A has a watchlist hit of type B
effects: Once I unlink a watchlist hit type B from a screening case A, it is the case that B is available on the watchlist
Once I unlink a watchlist hit type B from a screening case A, it is not the case anymore that A has a watchlist hit of type B

link_sanction_match_to_case.description: link a sanction match B to a screening case A
preconditions: I can only link a sanction match B to a screening case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B is available as a sanction match resource and A is mapped to B
effects: Once I link a sanction match B to a screening case A, it is the case that A has a sanction match with B
Once I link a sanction match B to a screening case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as a sanction match resource

unlink_sanction_match_from_case.description: unlink a sanction match B from a screening case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a sanction match B from a screening case A if it is the case that A has a sanction match with B
effects: Once I unlink a sanction match B from a screening case A, it is the case that B is available as a sanction match resource
Once I unlink a sanction match B from a screening case A, it is not the case anymore that A has a sanction match with B

link_sanctions_list_to_case.description: link a sanctions list B to a screening case A
preconditions: I can only link a sanctions list B to a screening case A if it is the case that A is a registered case and B is the selected sanctions list and A is mapped to B
effects: Once I link a sanctions list B to a screening case A, it is the case that A matches with the sanctions list B
Once I link a sanctions list B to a screening case A, it is not the case anymore that B is the selected sanctions list

unlink_sanctions_list_from_case.description: unlink a sanctions list B from a screening case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a sanctions list B from a screening case A if it is the case that A matches with the sanctions list B
effects: Once I unlink a sanctions list B from a screening case A, it is the case that B is the selected sanctions list
Once I unlink a sanctions list B from a screening case A, it is not the case anymore that A matches with the sanctions list B

escalate_case_with_channel_and_matches.description: escalate a screening case A with a transaction channel B, a party match C, and a watchlist hit type D
preconditions: I can only escalate a screening case A with a transaction channel B, a party match C, and a watchlist hit type D if it is the case that the profile is applied to A and A matches with the party C and A has a watchlist hit of type D and B is available and A is mapped to B
I can only escalate a screening case A with a transaction channel B, a party match C, and a watchlist hit type D if it is not the case that A has been adjudicated
effects: Once I escalate a screening case A with a transaction channel B, a party match C, and a watchlist hit type D, it is the case that A is assigned to the transaction channel B and A has been adjudicated
Once I escalate a screening case A with a transaction channel B, a party match C, and a watchlist hit type D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

escalate_case_with_sanction_and_referenc.description: escalate a screening case A with a transaction channel B, a sanction match C, and an external reference D
preconditions: I can only escalate a screening case A with a transaction channel B, a sanction match C, and an external reference D if it is the case that the profile is applied to A and A has a sanction match with C and D is available as an external reference and B is available and A is mapped to B and A is mapped to D
I can only escalate a screening case A with a transaction channel B, a sanction match C, and an external reference D if it is not the case that A has been adjudicated
effects: Once I escalate a screening case A with a transaction channel B, a sanction match C, and an external reference D, it is the case that A is assigned to the transaction channel B and A has been adjudicated and A requires senior review and A has a high risk flag

Once I escalate a screening case A with a transaction channel B, a sanction match C, and an external reference D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available as an external reference

clear_escalation_marker.description: clear escalation marker for a screening case A with a party match B and a watchlist hit type C
preconditions: I can only clear escalation marker for a screening case A with a party match B and a watchlist hit type C if it is the case that A has been adjudicated and A requires senior review and A matches with the party B and A has a watchlist hit of type C
effects: Once I clear escalation marker for a screening case A with a party match B and a watchlist hit type C, it is not the case anymore that A requires senior review and it is not the case anymore that A has a high risk flag

request_approval_from_business_unit.description: request approval from a business unit D for a screening case A with a party match B and a watchlist hit type C
preconditions: I can only request approval from a business unit D for a screening case A with a party match B and a watchlist hit type C if it is the case that evidence is collected for A and A has been adjudicated and A matches with the party B and A has a watchlist hit of type C and A is a member of D

I can only request approval from a business unit D for a screening case A with a party match B and a watchlist hit type C if it is not the case that A has a high risk flag and it is not the case that approval has been requested for A
effects: Once I request approval from a business unit D for a screening case A with a party match B and a watchlist hit type C, it is the case that approval has been requested for A

request_approval_from_escalation_committ.description: request approval from an escalation committee D for a screening case A with a sanction match B and a sanctions list C
preconditions: I can only request approval from an escalation committee D for a screening case A with a sanction match B and a sanctions list C if it is the case that evidence is collected for A and A has been adjudicated and A has a sanction match with B and A matches with the sanctions list C and A is a member of D
I can only request approval from an escalation committee D for a screening case A with a sanction match B and a sanctions list C if it is not the case that approval has been requested for A
effects: Once I request approval from an escalation committee D for a screening case A with a sanction match B and a sanctions list C, it is the case that approval has been requested for A and A has a high risk flag

finalize_adjudication.description: finalize adjudication for a screening case A with a party match B and a watchlist hit type C
preconditions: I can only finalize adjudication for a screening case A with a party match B and a watchlist hit type C if it is the case that approval has been requested for A and A has a high risk flag and A matches with the party B and A has a watchlist hit of type C
effects: Once I finalize adjudication for a screening case A with a party match B and a watchlist hit type C, it is the case that A is ready for final approval

Once I finalize adjudication for a screening case A with a party match B and a watchlist hit type C, it is not the case anymore that A has a high risk flag and it is not the case anymore that evidence is collected for A and it is not the case anymore that A requires senior review

investigator_recollects_evidence_for_fin.description: investigator an investigator C recollects an alert evidence B for final approval of a screening case A
preconditions: I can only investigator an investigator C recollects an alert evidence B for final approval of a screening case A if it is the case that A is ready for final approval and approval has been requested for A and the profile is applied to A and A has a case evidence link to B and C is available as an investigator
I can only investigator an investigator C recollects an alert evidence B for final approval of a screening case A if it is not the case that evidence is collected for A
effects: Once I investigator an investigator C recollects an alert evidence B for final approval of a screening case A, it is the case that evidence is collected for A

assign_approver_via_evidence.description: assign approver via an alert evidence B for a screening case A
preconditions: I can only assign approver via an alert evidence B for a screening case A if it is the case that approval has been requested for A and evidence is collected for A and A has a case evidence link to B
I can only assign approver via an alert evidence B for a screening case A if it is not the case that A has a high risk flag and it is not the case that an approver has been assigned to A
effects: Once I assign approver via an alert evidence B for a screening case A, it is the case that an approver has been assigned to A

assign_approver_via_automated_reason.description: assign approver via an automated hit reason B for a screening case A
preconditions: I can only assign approver via an automated hit reason B for a screening case A if it is the case that approval has been requested for A and evidence is collected for A and B is available as an automated hit reason
I can only assign approver via an automated hit reason B for a screening case A if it is not the case that A has a high risk flag and it is not the case that an approver has been assigned to A
effects: Once I assign approver via an automated hit reason B for a screening case A, it is the case that an approver has been assigned to A
Once I assign approver via an automated hit reason B for a screening case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as an automated hit reason

assign_approver_for_case.description: assign an approver B to a screening case A
preconditions: I can only assign an approver B to a screening case A if it is the case that an approver has been assigned to A and B is available as an approver and B is a candidate for approving A
effects: Once I assign an approver B to a screening case A, it is the case that B is assigned to A
Once I assign an approver B to a screening case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available as an approver

coordinate_approver_assignment_between_t.description: coordinate an approver C assignment between a crossborder transaction A and a domestic transaction B
preconditions: I can only coordinate an approver C assignment between a crossborder transaction A and a domestic transaction B if it is the case that A is a registered case and A requires a cross border approval path and C is eligible for the case A and C is assigned to B
I can only coordinate an approver C assignment between a crossborder transaction A and a domestic transaction B if it is not the case that C has an approval record for the case A
effects: Once I coordinate an approver C assignment between a crossborder transaction A and a domestic transaction B, it is the case that C has an approval record for the case A

mark_case_for_final_review.description: mark a screening case A for final review with an alert evidence B by an investigator C
preconditions: I can only mark a screening case A for final review with an alert evidence B by an investigator C if it is the case that A is a registered case and A requires a cross border approval path and evidence is collected for A and an approver has been assigned to A and A has a case evidence link to B and C is available as an investigator
I can only mark a screening case A for final review with an alert evidence B by an investigator C if it is not the case that A is marked for final review
effects: Once I mark a screening case A for final review with an alert evidence B by an investigator C, it is the case that A is marked for final review

release_case_by_domestic_criteria.description: release a screening case A by domestic criteria
preconditions: I can only release a screening case A by domestic criteria if it is the case that A requires a domestic approval path and A is a registered case and the profile is applied to A and A has been adjudicated and approval has been requested for A and an approver has been assigned to A and evidence is collected for A
I can only release a screening case A by domestic criteria if it is not the case that A has been released
effects: Once I release a screening case A by domestic criteria, it is the case that A has been released

release_case_by_approver_criteria.description: release a screening case A by an approver B criteria
preconditions: I can only release a screening case A by an approver B criteria if it is the case that A requires a cross border approval path and A is a registered case and the profile is applied to A and A has been adjudicated and approval has been requested for A and an approver has been assigned to A and evidence is collected for A and B has an approval record for the case A
I can only release a screening case A by an approver B criteria if it is not the case that A has been released
effects: Once I release a screening case A by an approver B criteria, it is the case that A has been released

release_case_by_final_review.description: release a screening case A by final review
preconditions: I can only release a screening case A by final review if it is the case that A requires a cross border approval path and A is a registered case and the profile is applied to A and A has been adjudicated and approval has been requested for A and an approver has been assigned to A and evidence is collected for A and A is marked for final review
I can only release a screening case A by final review if it is not the case that A has been released
effects: Once I release a screening case A by final review, it is the case that A has been released

action_nl_templates.assign_profile_to_case: assign screening profile {?screening_profile} to screening case {?screening_case}
action_nl_templates.retract_profile_from_case: retract screening profile {?screening_profile} from screening case {?screening_case}

action_nl_templates.detach_alert_evidence_from_case: detach alert evidence {?alert_evidence} from screening case {?screening_case}

action_nl_templates.unlink_party_match_from_case: unlink party match {?party_match} from screening case {?screening_case}

action_nl_templates.unlink_watchlist_hit_from_case: unlink watchlist hit type {?watchlist_hit_type} from screening case {?screening_case}

action_nl_templates.unlink_sanction_match_from_case: unlink sanction match {?sanction_match} from screening case {?screening_case}
action_nl_templates.link_sanctions_list_to_case: link sanctions list {?sanctions_list} to screening case {?screening_case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_sanctions_list_from_case: unlink sanctions list {?sanctions_list} from screening case {?screening_case}
action_nl_templates.escalate_case_with_channel_and_matches: escalate screening case {?screening_case} with transaction channel {?transaction_channel}, party match {?party_match}, and watchlist hit type {?watchlist_hit_type}
action_nl_templates.escalate_case_with_sanction_and_referenc: escalate screening case {?screening_case} with transaction channel {?transaction_channel}, sanction match {?sanction_match}, and external reference {?external_reference}

action_nl_templates.request_approval_from_business_unit: request approval from business unit {?business_unit} for screening case {?screening_case} with party match {?party_match} and watchlist hit type {?watchlist_hit_type}

action_nl_templates.finalize_adjudication: finalize adjudication for screening case {?screening_case} with party match {?party_match} and watchlist hit type {?watchlist_hit_type}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a screening case or a screening profile or a transaction channel or a watchlist hit type or a party match or a sanction match or a alert evidence or a automated hit reason or a approver or a investigator or a external reference or a sanctions list or a approval group is also a object
Everything that is a business unit or a escalation committee is also a approval group
Everything that is a domestic transaction or a crossborder transaction is also a screening case
